summary: Good audience recording of a rare second‑set, sound is praised and works well for listeners.
review: The reviewer loves the audio quality, noting that this is one of the few decent audience recordings of the show's second set. No specific performance issues are mentioned, and the overall tone is positive despite the lack of detailed musical commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) that praises the sound; recording quality appears good, but no concrete show performance details are provided.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says they love the sound and finds it usable for the second set; no complaints about clarity or noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only the second set is highlighted as being in good audio form; no further comments on pacing or transitions.
